name: prospect-studio
description: B2B lead generation, prospecting, and outreach workspace for Claude Code — with optional Frappe/ERPNext CRM sync

serpapi_key.title: SerpAPI Key
serpapi_key.description: SerpAPI key for web research — get from serpapi.com (Dashboard → API Key)

apify_token.title: Apify API Token (optional)
apify_token.description: Apify API token for the Apify MCP server — get from console.apify.com/settings/integrations. Enables dynamic Actor discovery, RAG web browsing, and compliant LinkedIn scrapers. Leave blank to disable.

frappe_url.title: Frappe/ERPNext URL (optional)
frappe_url.description: Base URL of your Frappe/ERPNext site for pushing leads to the CRM, e.g. https://erp.mycompany.com (no trailing slash). Leave blank to disable Frappe sync.

frappe_api_key.title: Frappe API Key (optional)
frappe_api_key.description: Frappe API key — get from your Frappe user's Settings → API Access. Required only if frappe_url is set.

frappe_api_secret.title: Frappe API Secret (optional)
frappe_api_secret.description: Frappe API secret paired with frappe_api_key. Required only if frappe_url is set.

frappe_lead_owner.title: Frappe Lead Owner Email (optional)
frappe_lead_owner.description: Default owner email for new leads pushed to Frappe, e.g. sales@mycompany.com. Used when a lead profile doesn't specify one.

workspace_root.title: Workspace Root
workspace_root.description: Absolute path to your workspace directory, e.g. /home/user/leads or D:/work/leads
